transcript.text: Just me today, so.
Sweet.
Why do I have?
Cool.
Well, yeah, I think we just have some performance updates for you.
And then, yeah, we're still making our way through the LLC formation cluster.
And I think we have, like, maybe, like, at least 50 more to go in that cluster.
And then we'll move on to foreign registration and nexus rules.
Okay.
Yeah, probably the more than that, actually.
Yeah.
Yeah.
But we're plowing through them.
It's amazing how many we're getting done each week.
Yeah, I can just jump into performance and we can probably, yeah, get you back some time today as well.
It shouldn't take too long.
Yeah, so.
We're on track to deliver our regular cadence of 26 articles so far, and so that we've got like 247 published so far to date, including today, the ones that they published today.
Yeah, taking a look at the overall site performance this past week, so going up to August 10th, we're actually down for the first time in like our big upward trend by a few clicks.
But still up in impressions, kind of continuing to climb there.
So here's a sort of week-on-week look, and we're down like 18 clicks and up over 10K impressions.
So nothing too alarming there, basically, it's not a huge dip.
It can also be attributed to the fact that like, so we have a new Looker dashboard set up here.
I've actually linked to it further down in, um, right about here.
in the agenda.
So that's been made for us recently.
It can track a lot more things like, I think we showed you like the LLM tracking and different things that are in there.
And basically, it works best with like looking up to the previous Sunday look, whereas before we were doing previous Saturday.
So that could also account for some slight adjustments there with clicks.
Sunday usually seeing like lower engagement than Saturday.
But it also could be the start of a postseason like cool down for traffic.
So we'll just kind of like keep our eyes on it.

You know, I think as we discussed before there, there's probably generally going to be kind of like some fluctuation there until we kind of get back up to the preseason kind of, or pre deadline kind of, what I would anticipate would be kind of more like rushes maybe.
But yeah, so other than that, like besides the like 18 clicks down, we still have like strong impression growth, 8.7 impressions, increase.
Obviously, you know, the more we broaden our topics and the articles that we have on, we should expect to see that to continue.

And then looking at the previous week for the actual resources page itself, I just kind of put here like a little tip on like how you can see if you want to go to that performance dashboard, where if you want to see like all the traffic on the site versus just the like growthx, like just the resources page, that kind of thing.
We have 23 clicks there, 29.2k impressions.
So that's actually no change week over week for the resources page in terms of clicks.
It stayed stable.
It's the same.
And there again, like impressions have gone up quite a bit.
So yeah, upward trajectory on the impressions weekly gains have gone from like 19.8k to 29k over the course of about a month.
And, yeah, basically, the site is appearing from queries, obviously, with more topics that were beginning to publish.
And, as per usual, it's kind of outlined the top pages here, pretty much the same pages as last week.
We've got the Oklahoma Resources page coming up on there, not like, you know, insane clicks, but gained quite a few impressions since it was published.
And, yeah, that's pretty much the quick overview of the traffic on the site.
But, yeah, basically, still continuing to climb, slight decrease in the overall site clicks, but nothing too incredible.

The only other thing I wanted to say is that just regarding the alt text and additions to the images, we actually have somebody else on our team working on that who handles, like, publishing on a bunch of people's sites.
And they're dealing with it in chunks because they went into it thinking.
was a lot fewer pages than it actually was.
And so they did like up to 80 of them yesterday and they're going to just kind of do them in chunks day by day.
They think they'll have them done by early next week.
So, yeah, very easy task, a little bit tedious, but they're getting through it.
So that should be done pretty soon.
Yeah, that's all I pretty much had to say on performance and other things on my end.
Was there any questions about me?
No, I mean, this is pretty straightforward.
There's going to be some vicissitudes on a week to week basis.
So like, yeah, it's like, it's not, you know, I think I would think, you know, like 18 clicks over the is not really a huge, huge thing.
I think we're going to see probably greater fluctuations.

I'm, you know, this being kind of new to me, like I'm just anticipating the further away we get from those like most common deadlines, probably we might see some like more drops and then like increases as we get further, you know, closer to those deadlines.
But yeah, everything impression growth is suggesting that, you know, search visibility is expanding week over week anyways.
And.
So market reaches, like, always continue to grow, which is, you know, what we want to see.
Cool.
So the only other thing is last week we talked about tracking, which is something I have on my to-do list.
What are people doing today for tracking?
Are they using just UTMs on all these buttons?
Or, like, how are they tracking user journeys from content to, like, a demo booking, for example?
Yeah, I think, yeah, UTM, yeah, UTM parameters are the main.
And then they're using that within HubSpot, or I know some folks are using Salesforce as well.
just kind of depends on what you prefer.
But, yeah, I feel like those UTMs are going to be super helpful in actually having those set up properly to make sure that we're, like, tracking that full journey.
Yeah.
Yeah.
Okay.
I'll have to think about the best way to do that because, like, you know, I can't put a UTM on every button on this web.
Now that we've got like several hundred pieces of content, so I got to figure out what is there.

Like, yeah, and like there's a couple different places, like, you know, stay up, you go to like a random resources page, there's obviously a few different places where you can, you know, click from there, right, with the demo button and then like the in-text kind of thing.
So, that's going to make it a little bit trickier for sure.
Like, you could add a different parameter to the demo one for the in-text even to like track, you know, if you want to see like which thing people are clicking in particular.
But yeah, it's going to be a little bit tricky there for sure in terms of like, if it's, you know, it's all see a demo.
Yeah, it's going to be a bit harder.
Let me, let me think about it.
I'll, you know, I think our like inbound lead booking tool default has some.
Tooling here.
so really, because we're using that to capture the leads, I need to make sure that whatever our tracking is, works with that.
Right.
But yeah.
Okay.
Cool.
That's helpful.
Yeah, for sure.
It would be definitely interesting to have any context in terms of which blog pages.

But again, I do think that like, that's going to reflect like seasonally as well, you know, it's going to be dependent on, you know, which pages, but I think like those top of pillar pages, like the one that you added like yesterday, and like the other one that we, what was it, the one that kind of continues to be the top five, the franchise resources page and that kind of thing, like, you know, those are going to continue to be like the more like stable pages, like week over week, I think, but, but yeah, we're probably going to see like regardless of like lead tracking or whatever, like we're going to have
Kind of factor that in with like seasonality and that kind of stuff.
Yep.
Okay.
Cool.
Makes sense.
Yeah.
All right.
Do you guys need anything else from me?
Not on my end.
That was just, yeah, I just wanted to pass on the performance stuff and, yeah, just give you a little update about the small task with the image, the image, all tech stuff.
And, yeah, if you had anything else that you wanted me to look at in terms of that page and formatting and everything, I'm not sure we left off with that in terms of like if you can see the HTML.
HTML view on the back end of like blog pages, I can't.

It doesn't seem like, you know, normally with like CMSs, you can switch between views and then I can see like HTML and like normally the extra spacing would be like div tag stuff, like in WordPress, for example, you know.
But I think what's happening here is that the styles in Webflow for some of the resource pages are kind of funky.
Like quality in Webflow are always.
Weird, but like if you had a sub bullet and it's the end of that list, it's actually the beginning of a new list, which creates space.
So like there's some weird things.

Yeah, I noticed that on other pages too, where I was just kind of like, wow, it looks like there's a bit too much space between like the H2 and like where the paragraph starts or like when the paragraph ends in like the next H2.
But then, yeah, going into pages, I couldn't figure out like it looks totally normal.

So, so yeah, if there's anything you want us to do there, like if you want to change anything stylistically to fix that, then I mean, I don't think it looks terrible, but it's just that it does look like a bit chunked out like the space.
It's not terrible.
I agree.
It could be better, but I look like, I'll look into it.
Cool.
Okay.
Awesome.
Okay.
Well, anything else comes up then, yeah, we're always on Slack.
And yeah, if you need anything else, you know, going through any pages you're, you're publishing on the side or whatever, then just like hit me up and I'm happy to look at anything.
Sounds good.
Thanks, guys.
Have a great night.
Take care.
Bye.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Discern and GrowthX to discuss content performance, ongoing projects, and tracking strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/jZtjLbFeXWZjw3SKKJfNLmvSqhyRj5Dx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Site performance: 247 articles published to date, slight dip in clicks (-18) but continued growth in impressions (+10K)](https://fathom.video/share/jZtjLbFeXWZjw3SKKJfNLmvSqhyRj5Dx?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Ongoing projects: LLC formation cluster (\~50+ articles remaining), alt text additions (80% complete, ETA early next week)](https://fathom.video/share/jZtjLbFeXWZjw3SKKJfNLmvSqhyRj5Dx?tab=summary&timestamp=17.0)
  - [Tracking discussion: UTM parameters primary method, need to strategize implementation for Discern's growing content library](https://fathom.video/share/jZtjLbFeXWZjw3SKKJfNLmvSqhyRj5Dx?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [26 articles delivered this week, totaling 247 published to date](https://fathom.video/share/jZtjLbFeXWZjw3SKKJfNLmvSqhyRj5Dx?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Overall site performance (up to Aug 10):](https://fathom.video/share/jZtjLbFeXWZjw3SKKJfNLmvSqhyRj5Dx?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)
      - [Clicks: Down 18 (first dip in upward trend)](https://fathom.video/share/jZtjLbFeXWZjw3SKKJfNLmvSqhyRj5Dx?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
      - [Impressions: Up 10K+ (continuing to climb)](https://fathom.video/share/jZtjLbFeXWZjw3SKKJfNLmvSqhyRj5Dx?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
  - [Resources page performance:](https://fathom.video/share/jZtjLbFeXWZjw3SKKJfNLmvSqhyRj5Dx?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
      - [Clicks: 23 (no change week-over-week)](https://fathom.video/share/jZtjLbFeXWZjw3SKKJfNLmvSqhyRj5Dx?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
      - [Impressions: 29.2K (up from 19.8K a month ago)](https://fathom.video/share/jZtjLbFeXWZjw3SKKJfNLmvSqhyRj5Dx?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [Top pages remain consistent, with Oklahoma Resources page gaining traction](https://fathom.video/share/jZtjLbFeXWZjw3SKKJfNLmvSqhyRj5Dx?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [Slight decrease in overall site clicks, but not alarming; could be start of post-season cool down](https://fathom.video/share/jZtjLbFeXWZjw3SKKJfNLmvSqhyRj5Dx?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)

### New Looker Dashboard

  - [Recently set up for more comprehensive tracking (e.g., LLM tracking)](https://fathom.video/share/jZtjLbFeXWZjw3SKKJfNLmvSqhyRj5Dx?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)
  - [Best used with data up to previous Sunday (vs. previous Saturday)](https://fathom.video/share/jZtjLbFeXWZjw3SKKJfNLmvSqhyRj5Dx?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
  - [Accessible for viewing all site traffic vs. just resources page](https://fathom.video/share/jZtjLbFeXWZjw3SKKJfNLmvSqhyRj5Dx?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)

### Ongoing Projects

  - [LLC formation cluster: \~50+ articles remaining](https://fathom.video/share/jZtjLbFeXWZjw3SKKJfNLmvSqhyRj5Dx?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)
  - [Next topics: Foreign registration and nexus rules](https://fathom.video/share/jZtjLbFeXWZjw3SKKJfNLmvSqhyRj5Dx?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)
  - [Alt text additions:](https://fathom.video/share/jZtjLbFeXWZjw3SKKJfNLmvSqhyRj5Dx?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
      - [80 pages completed yesterday](https://fathom.video/share/jZtjLbFeXWZjw3SKKJfNLmvSqhyRj5Dx?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
      - [Expected completion by early next week](https://fathom.video/share/jZtjLbFeXWZjw3SKKJfNLmvSqhyRj5Dx?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
      - [Being done in chunks due to larger than expected page count](https://fathom.video/share/jZtjLbFeXWZjw3SKKJfNLmvSqhyRj5Dx?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Tracking Strategy Discussion

  - [Current method: UTM parameters + HubSpot/Salesforce](https://fathom.video/share/jZtjLbFeXWZjw3SKKJfNLmvSqhyRj5Dx?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
  - [Challenge: Implementing UTMs on numerous content pieces (several hundred)](https://fathom.video/share/jZtjLbFeXWZjw3SKKJfNLmvSqhyRj5Dx?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
  - [Considerations:](https://fathom.video/share/jZtjLbFeXWZjw3SKKJfNLmvSqhyRj5Dx?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
      - [Multiple click points on resource pages (demo button, in-text links)](https://fathom.video/share/jZtjLbFeXWZjw3SKKJfNLmvSqhyRj5Dx?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
      - [Potential for different parameters to track specific user interactions](https://fathom.video/share/jZtjLbFeXWZjw3SKKJfNLmvSqhyRj5Dx?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
      - [Need to ensure compatibility with inbound lead booking tool](https://fathom.video/share/jZtjLbFeXWZjw3SKKJfNLmvSqhyRj5Dx?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)

### Content Seasonality

  - [Anticipating fluctuations in traffic and engagement based on tax/business deadlines](https://fathom.video/share/jZtjLbFeXWZjw3SKKJfNLmvSqhyRj5Dx?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [Top pillar pages (e.g., franchise resources) expected to maintain more stable traffic](https://fathom.video/share/jZtjLbFeXWZjw3SKKJfNLmvSqhyRj5Dx?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)

### Webflow Formatting Issues

  - [Unusual spacing in resource pages, particularly with sub-bullets and list endings](https://fathom.video/share/jZtjLbFeXWZjw3SKKJfNLmvSqhyRj5Dx?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
  - [Limited ability to view/edit HTML directly in the CMS](https://fathom.video/share/jZtjLbFeXWZjw3SKKJfNLmvSqhyRj5Dx?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
  - [Mike to investigate potential style adjustments in Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/jZtjLbFeXWZjw3SKKJfNLmvSqhyRj5Dx?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mike to strategize best approach for implementing tracking across growing content library](https://fathom.video/share/jZtjLbFeXWZjw3SKKJfNLmvSqhyRj5Dx?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [Team to continue monitoring performance, especially post-season trends](https://fathom.video/share/jZtjLbFeXWZjw3SKKJfNLmvSqhyRj5Dx?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
  - [Complete alt text additions by early next week](https://fathom.video/share/jZtjLbFeXWZjw3SKKJfNLmvSqhyRj5Dx?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [Mike to look into Webflow formatting issues for potential style improvements](https://fathom.video/share/jZtjLbFeXWZjw3SKKJfNLmvSqhyRj5Dx?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [Jenn available for review of any newly published pages or content as needed](https://fathom.video/share/jZtjLbFeXWZjw3SKKJfNLmvSqhyRj5Dx?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)

action_items.description: Investigate best method for implementing user journey tracking (UTMs, etc.) compatible w/ inbound lead booking tool; consider scalability for 100s of content pieces
Brainstorm solutions for tracking user journeys across multiple content pieces, incl. diff. click locations (demo button, in-text links)
Investigate & potentially fix weird spacing issues in Webflow for resource pages (sub-bullets, list endings, H2 spacing)
